buildCommand: cd /vercel/path0 && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && cd /vercel/path0/artifacts/haven-web && PORT=3000 BASE_PATH=/ npx vite build --config vite.config.ts && ls -la /vercel/path0/artifacts/haven-web/dist/public/ && cp -r /vercel/path0/artifacts/haven-web/dist/public /vercel/path0/_site
